location_name: El Tapón Lagoon, eastern Vieques (near Camp García), Puerto Rico
description: US Navy Sea Cadets (Cadetes de la Marina) during drills encountered small dark beings 3-4 ft tall, skinny, long arms, large egg-shaped heads, moving at incredible speed in zigzagging/jumping pattern at El Tapón Lagoon. Beings would appear suddenly, then run and jump into lagoon. Blue-white luminous spheres (4-8 inch diameter) also observed entering lagoon waters. Instructor corroborated account. Cadets stopped conducting night drills in area. Source: Jorge Martín/IRAAP.
Family saw 7 lights in formation; heard explosion shortly after.
AI onboard underwater bot triggered evasive maneuver. External influence vector logged.
Classic domed disc hovered then shot southwest; orange hue reported.
Chevron formation of lights silently passed overhead.

Fishermen Corcino and Carlos Zenón witnessed a massive, disc-shaped craft rise silently from the sea during a nighttime fishing trip. The object emitted no sound and absorbed a large quantity of seawater before ascending into the sky at high speed. Both also reported seeing multiple luminous spheres (blue-white in color) moving intelligently above the nearby swamps and lagoons. Jorge Martín interviewed both witnesses in Vieques as part of his investigation into UAP activity and alleged U.S. Navy/ET presence on the island.
15 witnesses reported a fast red circular light (perhaps disc-like) under low clouds moving silently across the sky for ~2 minutes; some noted a “crown” of lights . 15

location_name: South of Navy firing range, Vieques, Puerto Rico
description: Angel Encarnación and fishermen: observed huge disc-shaped flying saucer hovering ~100 ft over ocean off Vieques south coast. Object had yellow/green/red rotating lights around edge and single large green light on bottom. Object was absorbing seawater in visible upward column through underside. After several minutes departed at high speed toward El Yunque. Second incident: huge round green light rose from seafloor, surfaced silently, rose into sky with sound of water falling. Source: Jorge Martín/IRAAP UFOs and Aliens in the Caribbean (2000).
Dos pezcadores tienen experiencias separadas y son entrevistados por Martin
1 witness saw a bright orange orb (near Jupiter) that split into 3 orbs (1 orange, 2 blue); all moved silently at ~3000 km/h across the sky . 1

Marie Molina awoke to noises on her zinc roof and dogs barking. Looking out, she saw a tall pale-skinned humanoid with wrinkled skin, long ears, elongated limbs, and an egg-shaped head. Its eyes were elongated white with black centers. It stood ~15 ft away, shaking constantly as if in cramps, with clenched hands in a “prayer-like” posture. She observed it for ~15 min before fear set in. When she accidentally made a noise, it turned to face her and she felt a telepathic command to shut her eyes. She resisted, then shortly after, the entity vanished before a relative arrived to help. Afterward, she reported a sudden change: she quit smoking effortlessly after being a lifelong chain smoker.
Farmer reported a silver spherical object hovering ~15 ft above his field; it emitted a low oscillating hum. Livestock refused to approach the area for hours afterward.

location_name: Monte Carmelo, near Camp García, Vieques, Puerto Rico
description: 9:30 PM. Prof. Gazir Sued (Inter-American University sociologist) and several companions on Monte Carmelo observing military zone: saw large oval with approximately 7 smaller brilliant ovals in its interior along its length, emitting bluish-white light like electric welder. Completely static for ~15 minutes near Observation Post #1 and soldiers' barracks inside Camp García. When observers briefly looked away, object had vanished. No explanation found. Source: Jorge Martín, Vieques: Polígono del 3er. Tipo (2001).

Researchers José A. Martínez Echevarría and Luiseppi Quiñones documented a UFO over Cabo Rojo. A video shows an object moving stealthily across the skies, accompanied by narration and preliminary analyses of the sighting. The footage was uploaded to YouTube as part of the Expediente OVNI project.
Civilian witnesses reported an unidentified aerial object over the interior mountainous region during the early post-2000 period, with no coastal association mentioned.
Civilians reported massive triangular craft above restricted airspace. Security forced evacuation. Object described as football-field sized.

Private pilot Juan Rivera reported being followed by a wingless, metallic craft during flight. The object was clearly visible but failed to appear on radar. Rivera filed an official report with aviation authorities, but no formal response was issued. His aviation credentials and direct testimony strengthen the case’s reliability.
Pilot filmed slow-moving, shiny silver object. Clear sky.
Ram Ricky reported a translucent being near his bed. Secondary-source intake; exact date unresolved.
Civilian witnesses reported luminous aerial lights over the south coast during the early post-2000 period.

location_name: Santa María Shopping Center, Río Piedras (San Juan), Puerto Rico
description: 5:00-6:00 p.m. Mrs. Elba Rivera and husband + several bystanders observed large shiny silvery isosceles triangle-shaped UFO from shopping center parking lot. Object appeared motionless over Bayamón area, size ~3 inches at arm's length. Remained 1 minute until dark cloud covered it; when cloud cleared, object gone. Source: Jorge Martín (rense.com March 2004).
Farmer’s security camera captured a “metallic humanoid” inspecting crops at 3 AM.
Multiple witnesses observed a strange object with unusual shape over the water.

Radar at the former Ramey Air Force Base tracked a large wingless triangular craft passing over Rafael Hernández Airport at night. It was silent, photographed by Guardia Nacional, and nearly collided with two approaching A-7 jets. Officials speculated it might be an unreported DoD test or unknown craft .
Residents and police reported submerged lights and humanoids. Mayor supported “Extraterrestrial Route.”
Fishermen reported an unidentified luminous object offshore along the west coast during the mid-2000s.

location_name: Sierra Bermeja, Lajas, Puerto Rico (Route PR-303)
description: Night. During a UFO skywatch at one of Reinaldo Ríos' UFO Camps, Sierra Bermeja region: dozens of witnesses observed a series of strange lights with unusual movements over the vicinity. Ríos terminated the skywatch activity to observe the lights more carefully. Radio program 'Los Ovnis Y Usted' also reported sightings of an enormous light in space that night following Ríos' activity. Source: Inexplicata December 2004, Lucy Guzmán from Ovni.Net database.

location_name: College Park and Altamesa, Río Piedras (San Juan), Puerto Rico
description: 5:00-6:00 p.m. Mrs. Elba Rivera and several others observed large shiny silvery cylinder-shaped object flying W to E. Size described as 'almost six feet long' at several miles' distance, indicating enormous actual size. Disappeared in seconds. Source: Jorge Martín (rense.com March 2004).
Amateur videographer recorded a glowing disc over restricted waters at Roosevelt Roads. The object hovered, pulsed, then submerged at a 45° angle. (Footage was later withdrawn from public access.)

Security officer José Vélez observed large luminous spheres with bluish-white light (like electric arc welding) approaching Observatory and hovering, increasing and decreasing in apparent size (interpreted as approach/withdrawal). Seen multiple times, assessed as intelligently controlled. Additionally: (1) Police witnessed large luminous cylinder hovering over Observatory; (2) Residents observed landings of silvery saucer-craft with humanoid crews in silver suits; (3) Saucer-craft observed on ground, then took off after human personnel departed in white van from Road #10 near Observatory; (4) US military Hummers pursued ovoid objects flying into Río Abajo forest. Source: Jorge Martín IRAAP (2005).

location_name: Highway 635, south of Arecibo Radio Observatory, Lares, Puerto Rico
description: Security officer Pedro Pérez and his son observed large metallic sphere, silver-plated with polished surface, perfectly spherical, suspended motionless in sky. No doors, windows, or motor visible. After hovering silently, made sudden fast movement south and vanished. Source: Jorge Martín, IRAAP Arecibo article (2005).
In daylight, residents reported unknown flying objects performing rapid maneuvers over their towns. Amateur investigators documented these sightings on video, showing fast-moving craft-like lights .
Law-enforcement officers reported observing anomalous aerial lights during patrol operations along the north coast in the post-2005 period.
Fishermen saw a luminous sphere rise from the sea, joined by two smaller lights, merged, then shot upward. Boat compasses and radios malfunctioned.
José Corrales photographed a huge silent triangular UFO at night passing overhead; it was “the size of a ballpark or two,” and the witness’s van engine and lights went out as it passed.

location_name: Urb. Los Angeles, Carolina, Puerto Rico
description: Night. José Corrales photographed a huge silent triangular UFO at near-midnight from residential area. MUFON case. Source: ThinkAboutItDocs/MUFON CMS.
UPR research glider recorded a magnetic field fluctuation at ~ 850 m depth during a passive scan; simultaneously, a UFO was reported streaking overhead.
Several civilians observed a bright, silent craft coming from the sea, accompanied by a low humming sound and followed by ground trace effects.

Resident María M. Rivera reported the onset of recurring phenomena including a deep, electrical hum passing over her home at approximately 3 a.m. She and her family observed a silver disc-shaped craft hovering nearby and small grey beings with slanted black eyes. The events were accompanied by episodes of partial paralysis and telepathic impressions. This night marked the first documented “Aguada Rainforest Encounter.”

6:27 PM. Dark object flying over Ponce making erratic axis rotations with slow forward movement at ~1000 ft altitude; moved W to E at 15-30 MPH, then made 100-degree left turn toward Playa de Ponce. Witness (aviation enthusiast) excluded all known aircraft types. Wife saw silver detail to object. Source: Inexplicata/OVNI.Net Jan 2006 summary, Lucy Guzmán.
Witnesses reported a dark object moving erratically over the city. Initially mistaken for a balloon; observed for ~3 minutes before vanishing.

10:00-11:00 AM. Near-black C-130 Hercules flying extremely low over Yauco urban area, dropping aerosol spray from wings (not engines), making repeated tight turns near TV/cell towers on hilltop off Hwy 2. Following the overflights: multiple residents of Yauco developed respiratory problems, nasal allergies, chest complaints, and hoarseness within days. Witness Rafy's family, schoolteacher, residents affected. Citywide phone calls made to San Juan to report. Source: Inexplicata/OVNI.Net Jan 2006 summary, Lucy Guzmán.
Residents saw a low-flying C-130 apparently releasing “spray.” Complaints of respiratory issues followed.

2:57 PM. Photographer ADC (pseudonym) took calibration sky shots with Canon EOS 350D (8MP, 28-105mm). Upon review, one frame (IMG_3699) showed unidentified object in clouds; immediately subsequent frame showed identical cloud formation but no object. Object described as 'mark' in clouds. Photos analyzed by Alexander Rivera. Source: Inexplicata/OVNI.Net Feb 2006 summary, Lucy Guzmán.
Photographer “ADC” captured a UFO in one frame while testing his camera; next photo taken seconds later showed only clouds. Photos analyzed by Alexander Rivera; object absent in control shot.
Witness saw a low-flying C-130 circling repeatedly near former Ramey AFB; remarked on “strange things” in the area.

Daytime. C-130 Hercules flying at low altitude in the vicinity of Ramey Air Base area (Aguadilla). Described as flying 'almost every day' circling the area. Anonymous witness stated: 'Almost every day you see an airplane circling around.' Military 4-engine aircraft. Source: Inexplicata/OVNI.Net Feb 2006 summary, Lucy Guzmán.

12:30 PM. Two C-130 Hercules aircraft (one black, one olive/camouflage) flew extremely low over Yauco at Yauco Plaza, barely clearing TV and cell towers on Hwy 2 hill, banking steeply until wings nearly touched the hillside. Residents phoned San Juan to report. Described as weekly routine. Coincided with island-wide Federal operations. Source: Inexplicata/OVNI.Net Feb 2006 summary, Lucy Guzmán.
Multiple residents including Rafael’s father saw two C-130s, one black, one camo, flying extremely low, brushing towers. Complaints made to San Juan authorities.
Witness saw another low-flying C-130 circling over his mother-in-law’s house.

Daytime. Military aircraft (believed to be C-130) flying low over residential area of Lares, making turns and circling back. Employee of researcher Alexander Rivera reported the aircraft flying low over his mother-in-law's house. Part of the same low-altitude C-130 wave over west/central PR. Source: Inexplicata/OVNI.Net Feb 2006 summary, Lucy Guzmán.
Elderly farming couple reported repeated falls of coins and stones from nowhere (since 2004). Phenomena occurred at home and in fields; coins preserved.

Elderly farming couple repeatedly pelted by coins and river stones by an invisible presence since 2004 (continuing through Feb 2006). Occurs mostly in morning when woman makes coffee, outdoors in fields, and in two different homes. Pattern suggests the phenomenon follows the new husband (remarried 2004 after 2003 widowing). Investigation by Andrew Álvarez and Lucy Guzmán pending. Source: Inexplicata/OVNI.Net Feb 2006 summary, Lucy Guzmán.

Elderly couple repeatedly encounters small human-shaped ball of light in their home. Seen emerging from bathroom, following husband. Woman also hears voices in unknown/alien language. Air conditioner abnormally sweats water during daytime requiring bucket. Investigation pending by Andrew Álvarez/Ovni.Net. Source: Inexplicata/OVNI.Net Feb 2006 summary, Lucy Guzmán.
Grandparents saw a small humanoid-shaped ball of light moving through their house; wife heard voices in unknown language. Entity vanished after following husband into bathroom.
Puppy found mutilated (precise injuries and a blood-loss claim). Vet necropsy confirmed non-predatory cause.
Multiple witnesses saw UFOs at 1,500–3,000 ft: a white cylinder, a silver rectangle that dissolved, and a grid of lights.

7-year-old daughter of paranormal researcher saw glowing red eyes enter window and materialize into 5'6" hairy humanoid, black lion-like fur, dog-like ears/claws, dirty canine teeth. It growled and chased witness. No odor/temp change detected. compared to older local case (similar sketch from El Mundo newspaper). No physical traces found.

Jessica Walker, her husband Misael Calderón, and their 5-year-old son recorded a home video at the zoo which later revealed a glowing humanoid figure with an egg-shaped head, black eyes, and small facial features. The figure was not seen during filming. Animals near the location were visibly disturbed. The boy identified the figure as an “alien.” Video shown to Lucy Guzman; analysis pending.

11:10 AM. Pedro Navarro driving past Mayagüez Zoo: observed shining metallic oval object (like two superimposed plates, self-glowing silver material, no separate lights) flying under clouds at ~3000 ft altitude, static for 15 seconds, then zigzagged and hid in cloud. SW to SE trajectory. Apparent size of birthday balloon. Navarro's first UFO sighting. Note: seen ~90 min before the zoo entity videotaping incident. Source: Inexplicata Feb 2007 summary, Lucy Guzmán/Ovni.Net.
Entity captured on video by Jessica Walker family. Egg-shaped head, two black eyes, appeared luminescent. Animals in zoo disturbed. Video analyzed by Lucy Guzman.

Pedro Navarro observed a shiny metallic oval object resembling two superimposed plates, glowing silver. It hovered under the clouds (~3000 ft) before zigzagging and disappearing into a cloud. He was unable to photograph it as he didn’t have his camera. He described the object as being the apparent size of a birthday balloon. This was his first UFO sighting. No evidence was recovered.
Pedro Navarro saw shining metallic oval (like two superimposed plates) flying under clouds ~3000 ft. Static 15 sec then zigzagged into cloud.

12:40 PM. Jessica Walker, husband Misael Calderón, and 5-year-old son filming video at Mayagüez Zoo in the area with wooden monkey and chicken cages. Upon reviewing footage at home, discovered a strange egg-headed creature with two black eyes, small mouth/nose, and apparent self-luminescence that was not visible during filming. Animals in the cage were disturbed, restless, and fled into shelter during filming. 5-year-old spontaneously said 'that looks like an alien.' Video pre-analyzed by Lucy Guzmán, Orlando Pla, Andrew Álvarez; dark humanoid silhouette confirmed. Full analysis pending. Source: Inexplicata Feb 2007 summary, Lucy Guzmán/Ovni.Net.

Night. Rita Rivera and sister observed and videotaped a white light behaving oddly in sky; horizontal route, then suddenly shut off. Not a satellite (witnesses familiar with satellites). Video secured by Ovni.Net for analysis. Source: Inexplicata Feb 2007 summary, Lucy Guzmán/Ovni.Net.

Rita Rivera and her sister videotaped a white light moving horizontally through the sky, which abruptly turned off. They ruled out a satellite based on its behavior. Both witnesses reported the sighting in person to researcher Lucy Guzman on February 8, 2007. Video evidence exists and is pending analysis.
Rita Rivera and sister observed and videotaped white light with horizontal motion that suddenly shut off. Ruled out satellite.

Lucy Guzman, Orlando Pla, and a third witness observed a very bright white light traveling east-to-west beneath the clouds. The light moved slowly and was larger and brighter than a star. It remained in view long enough for them to attempt photography. Cloud cover may have obscured it before it vanished.
Very bright white light under clouds ~1500-2000 ft, twice apparent size of Saturn. No navigation lights. Observed by 3 witnesses.

location_name: Mayagüez Lions Club, Mayagüez, Puerto Rico
description: 7:00 PM. Lucy Guzmán and Orlando Pla in Lions Club parking lot: observed very intense white light twice the apparent size of Saturn, under cloud layer at ~1500-2000 ft, moving E to W. Light dimmed then intensified again. No navigation lights, vanished — ruled out ISS, airplane, satellite. Not captured on video attempt. Source: Inexplicata Feb 2007 summary, Lucy Guzmán/Ovni.Net.

Lucy Guzman and Orlando Pla took a series of photographs during a tourist visit to “La Casona.” Upon reviewing the photos, they noticed 4 amorphous white objects in the sky and what appeared to be a face with dark eyes among the foliage in sequential images. The location is known for poltergeist activity, and native artifacts were found during renovations. Only Lucy’s photos have undergone pre-evaluation.
4 white objects in sequential photos (IMG_0637-0640) in clear sky. Possible humanoid face with large black eyes in foliage. Poltergeist activity reported at location.

location_name: Moca, Puerto Rico (La Casona historic site)
description: 12:34 PM. Researchers Lucy Guzmán and Orlando Pla photographed La Casona; completely clear sky. Sequential photos IMG_0637-0640 revealed: 4 white amorphous objects in sky not visible to naked eye; apparent humanoid face with large dark eyes in tree foliage. Poltergeist phenomena (shadows, opening doors, chains) reported at the house. Indian artifacts found during renovation suggesting possible native burial ground. Source: Inexplicata Feb 2007 summary, Lucy Guzmán/Ovni.Net.

location_name: Gurabo / Montanitas de Guaynabo, Puerto Rico
description: Edwin Fontanez (civil engineer/pilot/astronomer) saw white light emerge from cloud heading toward San Juan then sudden sideways movement. Not any known aircraft.

location_name: Montañitas de Guaynabo, near Route 52, Gurabo, Puerto Rico
description: 2:00-2:15 AM. Edwin Fontanéz (civil engineer, amateur astronomer, pilot) in Gurabo: single white light emerged from cloud heading toward San Juan, made a sideways course change — ruled out any known aircraft. Likely the same object seen from Lake Carraizo. Source: Inexplicata Feb 2007 summary, Lucy Guzmán/Ovni.Net.

location_name: Route 52, near Lake Carraizo, Puerto Rico
description: Lucy Guzman observed bright white ball of light ~1000m high moving E to W above Lake Carraizo. Vanished before camcorder secured.

location_name: Route 52 near Lake Carraizo, Caguas, Puerto Rico
description: 2:00 AM. Lucy Guzmán and Orlando Pla returning from Mayagüez: bright white ball of light (ping-pong ball apparent size) ~1000m high above Lake Carraizo moving E to W slowly toward expressway. Vanished before camera could be readied. Source: Inexplicata Feb 2007 summary, Lucy Guzmán/Ovni.Net.

location_name: Barrio Sabana Hoyos, Arecibo, Puerto Rico
description: 8:30 PM. Mr. Berríos (pseudonym) and one companion: brilliant red circular/star-like object at very high altitude moving horizontally. Source: Inexplicata Feb 2007 summary, Lucy Guzmán/Ovni.Net.

location_name: Barrio Sabana Hoyos, Arecibo, Puerto Rico
description: Brilliant red circular object like a star at very high altitude moving horizontally. 2 witnesses. Reported to OVNI.net.

A resident walking their dog near Villa Marina saw a formation of lights resembling a metallic object flying low. The object was completely silent. Witness believes others in the neighborhood also saw the object. Reported to Lucy Guzman the next day. No images or video were taken.

A report received by Lucy Guzman described an unidentified flying object over Arecibo. Details are minimal, but the case was considered credible and consistent with other sightings from the February 2007 wave. No photos or video reported.

location_name: Luis Muñoz Marín International Airport, Carolina
description: An airport employee (pseudonym “Mr. Rodriguez”) reported repeated sightings of bright, round or triangular white and red lights near the new control tower. One of the most intense sightings occurred at 8:20–8:30 p.m., when he boarded an American Eagle flight and witnessed a massive triangular UFO near Route 3. The object performed a U-turn and flew toward Fajardo and Vieques. Other witnesses confirmed seeing the object. Pilots refused to comment. Researcher Ana Ríos also saw similar lights from Isla Verde.

location_name: El Tamarindo Beach, Guánica, Puerto Rico
description: 9:00 PM. 17 witnesses (beachgoers and fishermen) at El Tamarindo beach near Copamarina Hotel: multicolored spinning-top-shaped object emerged suddenly. A smaller light emerged from the object and fell into the sea. Witnesses Maritza Martínez and husband Geraldo Cuevas contacted ARGUS-PR researcher José Martínez. Another anonymous fisherman stated this was not his first sighting of similar lights in the Guánica beach area. Source: Inexplicata August 2007/ARGUS-PR.

Around 9:00 p.m., 17 witnesses at El Tamarindo Beach (near the Copamarina Hotel) observed a multicolored, spinning-top-shaped object appear in the sky. A smaller light detached from the main object and fell into the sea. One experienced fisherman claimed this was not his first time seeing such phenomena in the area. Witnesses included Maritza Martínez and her husband Geraldo Cuevas.

The same household as the November 10, 2005 case reported renewed activity: a low-frequency hum followed by the family dog collapsing under an unknown influence and later vanishing despite being secured behind a fenced enclosure. The same witness, María Rivera, described luminous movements over the rainforest and a sense of telepathic presence similar to the 2005 incidents.

A photograph taken facing the eastern cliffs of Caja de Muertos shows a small, dark, disc-shaped object in the sky (upper right). The photographer did not notice the object at the time; it became apparent only after reviewing the image later. Weather was clear and bright, and no conventional aircraft were visible in the area.
3 witnesses saw a bright light toward the south that pulsed and changed colors (red, green, blue) at a high altitude. The light remained stationary and visible for a long duration.
Witnesses saw a cone-shaped luminous object joined by another. One made a sharp “L” turn toward San Juan.

Willie Durand Urbina (Puerto Rican Experimental Research Group director) documented ongoing Puerto Rico UFO flap. "Considerable amount of information reaching us; some cannot be published due to sensitive nature."

Estas imágenes fueron tomadas por una turista alemana en Pto. Rico, esta playa es un santuario para la exploración submarina ya que esta plagada de arrecifes y muchos corales así como por la diferentes especies que habitan en el lugar sobre todo por los tiburones ballenas que llegan alimentarse por el abundante plantón, esta zona es muy solitaria y para llegar al sitio tiene que pedir permiso a las autoridades ya esa parte de la isla es muy peligrosa por las mareas y el mar que es muy picado y por la gran cantidad de tiburones; las dos naves se encontraban prácticamente rasando el suelo como si estuvieran buscando algo y las mismas se reincorporan a gran velocidad a otras que están surcando el cielo, hasta los momentos no hay ningún informe oficial por lo sucedido ningún organismo de seguridad ha manifestado nada, pero según pescadores dicen que esa zona es muy tormentosa, puede ser que se trate del Yunque -

A woman saw a huge red fireball suddenly appear over her home. It hovered ~300 ft in the air, glowing intermittently for 20 minutes, then zig-zagged SW. It was described as “the size of a baseball stadium floodlight.”

Fireball reappeared over the location. Seen again by the same witness and several neighbors. One neighbor captured it on a cellphone. A twin-engine plane flew overhead ~15 minutes after the object vanished.

Domingo Morales (pilot) and wife visited his brother’s home in Valle Alta to investigate the fireball. At ~9:30 p.m., they saw two joined white lights at ~5000 ft that split—one going south, the other north. A woman and her daughters confirmed they had seen similar lights regularly since November between 5–10 p.m. Morales called FURA, but no helicopter flyover was observed.

3 witnesses observed three brilliant oval-shaped lights (red, green, blue tints) moving erratically in different directions before converging and separating for over 90 minutes above the Guajataca River area. Lights moved in circles, up/down/sideways, at ~45° elevation. No sound or EM effects noted. A similar static multicolor light had been seen on 18 December 2007 as well.
Morales returned with a camera in hopes of photographing the objects. The report does not specify if he captured them. Previous reports established frequent sightings in the area over several weeks.
“Mr. Blacky” & mother saw three lights circling, merging into one luminous source.

Multiple witnesses, including Roberto García and wife Patricia, saw an enormous classic disc-shaped UFO with hundreds of rows of red lights. It first followed a passing airplane, then hovered at treetop level on a nearby hill, blinding residents with its lights. Witnesses tried to photograph it but failed. After several minutes it departed at high speed toward Lajas. No sound was heard. Night was clear; the Lajas Aerostat was visible in the distance and could not be confused with the object. Some locals were left frightened and unable to sleep.

9:56 PM. Couple photographed UFO using Fuji Film Finepix AB20 (8.3MP, 4x optical zoom). Object described as solid shape making peculiar movements creating a plasma vortex — accumulation of radiation and heat energy. Object emitted very potent intermittent light. Three photographs subjected to optical/scientific analysis using Adobe Photoshop 6.0 by Puerto Rican Research Group (PRRG) technical personnel. Source: Inexplicata May 2008, Willie Durand Urbina, PRRG.
Couple photographed UFO at 9:56 p.m. Source: Willie Durand Urbina, Puerto Rican Experimental Research Group. Part of documented 2008 Puerto Rico UFO flap.

Technical personnel from the Puerto Rican Experimental Research Group performed an optical and scientific analysis employing Adobe Photoshop 6.0 on three photos depicting an unidentified flying object with a solid shape that made peculiar and typical movements. These movements created a plasma vortex, which is nothing more than the accumulation of energy made up of radiation and heat. Witness Report: "It all happened on Friday, March 17, 2008 at 9:56 p.m. when my husband and I looked out on a clear, unclouded night. What we saw that evening was to the north of our point of view, as it was possible to see a mountainous area in the background which gave us a more precise point of reference for the [object’s] position with regard to our own. My husband saw a brilliant light through the window, flashing in various colors and remaining static in the sky. He then summoned me to witness the event, and we were both able to clearly see the blinking light."
Witness observed an unusual craft of unknown design hovering and moving erratically.
A bright circular object observed moving across the sky, silent and steady, before disappearing.
Witnesses saw two red spheres moving parallel to sea at prodigious speed.
Witnesses saw three red spheres noiselessly crossing sky over the sea.
Dolores Toro saw a huge yellow luminous object fly inland, hover, then vanish.

Public Buildings Authority (A.E.P.) employees witnessed a brilliant luminous object resembling “acetylene light” moving west to east. The object then split into two and plunged into the sea. Researcher José A. Martínez suggested a possible aerolith but pursued confirmation with FURA. Case left open for investigation.
Civilian pilot reported a cigar-shaped object shadowing his plane.

Luisseppi Quinones initially believed the slow-moving object to be a helicopter. Upon seeing it turn, he identified a very large silent triangular craft with lights at each corner and a central light. It descended toward the sea and disappeared underwater.

José Martínez Echevarría stepped onto a terrace after rainfall and saw an enormous triangular object appear silently with a strong light. It crossed the sky slowly at low altitude before vanishing into clouds while he was on the phone with Willie Durand.

Luisseppi Quinones saw the same triangular object as in the October 31 case, this time slightly later in the evening. His son attempted to photograph it, but the camera failed to capture the image. It flew silently and followed the same route.
Radar systems detected an unidentified aerial object over Puerto Rico airspace during the 2010s; no visual confirmation documented.
Hikers encountered hovering craft with multicolored lights. Small humanoids with glowing eyes seen near treeline. Resonates with 1984 El Yunque case.
Wildlife photographer captured three frames of a luminous teardrop-shaped object rising from the lagoon; camera malfunctioned after the third shot and local dogs howled prior to the sighting.

Dionisio Grullón, visiting from Brooklyn, reported a large, bright light (described as a “flying saucer”) hovering for ~3.5 hours, illuminating the balcony. He claimed to have taken photos. The object remained stationary, occasionally “focusing” on him, before vanishing slowly. His brother-in-law, Rafael Bonilla, also witnessed it and compared its altitude to the Aerostat balloon once stationed in Lajas. Both men were convinced it was a UFO.

location_name: La Parguera / Laguna Cartagena area, Lajas, Puerto Rico
description: 7:40 PM. Researchers José A. Martínez, Luiseppi Quiñones, and Wanda I. Vélez near Laguna Cartagena: bright flashing object observed emitting powerful flashes reflected on passing cars, then dimmed when camcorder turned on. When camcorder turned off, object lit up again and flew toward Salinas de Cabo Rojo at extreme speed leaving incandescent wake, causing nearby dogs to howl (inaudible sound). 45 minutes later: second object observed headed toward Salinas de Cabo Rojo from the sea direction, rising and captured on video. Object flew from Cabo Rojo to Lajas to Monte del Estado (Maricao State Forest) where TV/radio/police repeaters are located. Source: Inexplicata Jan 2011/José Martínez.

location_name: Salinas de Cabo Rojo & Laguna Cartagena, Lajas
description: Researchers José A. Martínez, Luiseppi Quiñones, and Wanda I. Vélez observed multiple UFOs. At 7:40 PM, a powerful flash illuminated cars; initially thought to be from cell towers, but instead from a luminous object in the sky. When camcorder was switched off, the object reappeared and shot toward Salinas de Cabo Rojo at high speed, leaving a glowing wake. Local dogs howled as if affected by an inaudible sound. A second object appeared 45 minutes later, seemingly emerging from the sea, captured on video as it crossed from Cabo Rojo to Lajas, continuing toward Monte del Estado (Maricao State Forest) where communications repeaters are located.
Two triangular formation groups (for a total of eight red lighted objects) were observed southwest of where I live moving west.

location_name: Over Puerto Rico (en route to Florida)
description: 1 observer (on plane departing San Juan) photographed 3, then 4, circular lights traveling near the aircraft at night. (Anonymous lights caught on multiple photos.) . 1
A bright circular light hovered for several minutes before vanishing.
“Red/white/green flickering stationary triangular object over ocean.”
Residents & visiting scientists observed metallic disc maneuvering near telescope. Unusual radio interference during event. No official acknowledgment.

Locals reported a “gargoyle-like” creature preying on animals and possibly humans. Victims’ skeletons allegedly found in half-flooded tunnels of abandoned sugar mill. Described as large, winged, sulfur-smelling, feeding on animals by exsanguination. Officer Miguel Negrón heard loud wing-flapping while patrolling.

The same winged entity seen in the previous case was also reported in Lajas and San Germán. Witnesses reluctant to give names. One account described a man injured by a creature with large wings whose claws tore his abdomen “so deep his deep injury.”
Civilian-captured video shows a luminous aerial object along the north coast during the early 2010s.

José (26) and Jeami Martínez (21) discovered 30 chickens slaughtered in cages overnight. Animals had deep puncture marks and were blood-loss claim. Reporters found carcasses, broken cages, and animal prints. Police referred case to Civil Defense. Chief José Belardo dismissed it but admitted a U.S. Marines radar image had shown a strange creature. Couple suspected the Chupacabras.

Police (Agents Waleska Santiago & Ana Morales) and investigators documented a series of animal mutilations. At José Oscar Meléndez’s property, 3 piglets (40 days old) were found mutilated: one severely injured, one severely injured with surgically clean cuts, puncture wounds, blood-loss claim/no visible bleeding. Flesh resembled supermarket-processed meat; internal organs intact. Locals compared wounds to “Wolverine claws.” Earlier, a mare “Lucero” (owned by Osmin Ramos) and hens had also been killed. Witnesses in Vista Hermosa reported a creature resembling an ape fighting with a cat, then floating away carrying it. Residents also reported cows, goats, and dogs attacked. Cement casts were attempted of prints near the scene.
Driver Fernando Díaz struck by a winged creature (dog-like face, claws, 10-ft wingspan) that collided with his car. Another driver also witnessed.
Witness saw dark crouched figure with shiny eyes attack a goat; leapt 9 ft fence. Blood & hair samples collected.
Rancher Rey Rodríguez & nephew saw dark crouched figure with glowing orange eye, spines. It leapt & ran at high speed; later livestock found slaughtered.
Unknown entity killed goat, samples recovered (blood & hair).

location_name: Aguadilla, Rafael Hernandez Airport, Puerto Rico
description: CBP DHC-8 patrol aircraft (Wescam MX-15D FLIR) captured IR video of small light-emitting object at ~90 mph traversing airport environment, crossing into coastal airspace, appearing to enter ocean and re-emerge, then splitting into two objects. 165-page SCU analysis concluded object unexplained. AARO 2025 resolution: two Chinese lanterns (SCU disputes). Object delayed commercial flight departure.

IR sensor on a US Customs/Border aircraft recorded two UAPs splitting and skimming over the ocean. AARO later assessed the objects moved at wind speed and had no anomalous motion. A second, still-unreleased FLIR video from the same mission was confirmed by CBP but has not yet been publicly shared.
Chupacabras returned, killing 2 piglets, one missing. Photos published.

IBC Airways Swearingen SA-226 Metro III crashed into terrain near Sabana Hoyos. Residents reported explosion sounds. Radar showed descent at 900 fpm. The plane was en route from Santo Domingo to San Juan. FAA reported unknown cause; local police found wreckage the next morning. Eyewitness accounts describe no contact with Arecibo tower and unexpected crash behavior. Area suggested by some to involve possible cover-up or alternative explanations.
Recurrent report of a translucent humanoid outside a university office, accompanied by buzzing or vibration-like effects. Secondary-source intake.
A passenger aboard a JetBlue flight traveling from Orlando to Puerto Rico recorded a bright, cylindrical luminous object visible outside the airplane window during approach to the island.
Witness walking dog saw bright object appear from nowhere above Fajardo, rise ~200m, hover 5 seconds, then shot down at 60-degree angle. Captured on security camera. Posted to PuertoRicoUFOs.com.
NOAA research team recorded sonar contact with a mile-long “cylindrical object” at 8,000 ft depth.
Tourists & operators saw a submerged luminous object performing maneuvers underwater. Emerged briefly, hovered, then re-entered water without splash. Classic USO case.
Civilian-captured video shows luminous aerial object maneuvering along the west coast during the mid-2010s.

Multiple residents reported seeing a flying object as part of a surge in UFO activity in the area. Photos were allegedly taken but later deleted from the internet. Ufologist Reinaldo Rios and the local mayor investigated the sightings, adding a layer of official interest.
A brief flash-type aerial event occurred, lasting about 1 minute. No further description provided.
Witnesses reported a disc-shaped object, visible for approximately 40 minutes before vanishing.
A sighting classified as “Other” type lasted between 7–10 minutes. Specific object type or features not detailed.
University students camping inland reported a black, triangular craft with dim orange lights gliding silently overhead; their GPS and compass apps glitched for about 10 minutes afterward.

A photo surfaced on Facebook showing a large, hairy, dark creature standing in front of a clothesline. Caption claimed: “I just saw this at home eating a chicken.” The post was deleted hours later. Same area reported animal mutilations in 2013. Researchers noted the figure does not resemble any AKC dog breed or known animal. Identity of the witness was withheld; case remains under investigation.
“Transparent pyramid” photographed by tourists
Dozens of animals blood-loss claim; winged creature seen. Described as “La Gárgola.”
Video (Mundo Ovni) shows a supposed chupacabra attack on chickens in Lares . (No live witness count given; only recorded footage of animal carcasses.)
1 witness driving saw a large white segmented object (two egg-shaped segments with orb segments) hovering and moving silently; object remained in view ~25 min, photos taken . 1
FAA tracked unknown objects descending at 600+ mph
Police dashcam showed a “triangular craft” with pulsating lights hovering over highway.
Coast Guard drone malfunctioned while filming a spherical object.
Coast Guard drone filmed a “tic-tac” shaped object
Fishermen about 3 miles offshore recorded their sonar going dark and observed a submerged glowing oval ~ 10 m wide rise from beneath the surface, then ascend into the clouds without splash.
Civilian drone operator’s thermal footage caught an orb splitting into two just above the shoreline; footage was taken down after a DMCA claim by an unnamed defense contractor.
2 fishermen are recording a blue light under the water when a silhouette of a humanoid figure appears floating above the light.

Frontier Airlines Flight 4139 (A20N) at FL350 reported 2–5 lights moving up/down and left/right above the horizon. Pilot unable to determine distance or altitude. No evasive action; no ATC impact. Logged by Washington Operations Center.
A cylindrical shape over the Río Piedras area. Jorge Martín said: "There are reports of having been seen, in other parts of Puerto Rico."
Bodycam captured a streaking light that split into five.

Residents reported what appeared to be a submerged UFO during a city crisis. Videos and photos were allegedly shared by witnesses on social media, including @WorldNews_X_, but not all media remains accessible.

Two U.S. government agents reported seeing a silver circular craft (about the size of a weather balloon) streak across the sky at very high speed – traversing the entire horizon (~8 seconds) – before disappearing towards the sea .

Fishermen reported encountering a USO and a humanoid figure at sea. A video of the incident was shared on social media by @528vibes. Multiple crew members corroborated the story, lending strong credibility.
Civilian and author of this spreadsheet captured telescope footage of what looks like a star but it is maneuvering erraticallyat extreme speeds.
Bright object filmed entering and exiting the Caribbean Sea near Aguadilla; broadcast on Telemundo and analyzed as a possible USO.
Report of a translucent humanoid figure attributed to Marsh Cuadrado. Secondary-source intake; date unresolved.
Juan Rodríguez reported a transparent gelatinous humanoid while cutting brush. Secondary-source intake; exact date unresolved.
Witness described a gray-blue crab-like humanoid or heat-mirage-like entity near Fort Caprón. Secondary-source intake.
Daylight report of a transparent/crystalline figure near Highway 107. Secondary-source intake; exact date unresolved.
Report of a gelatinous/camouflage-like entity visually blending with the environment. Secondary-source intake.
Report of a pixelated humanoid form and metallic spheres in the Salinas/Yayales area. Exact date unresolved.
Report of an approximately 4-ft translucent humanoid crossing a road. Secondary-source intake; exact date unresolved.

Two orange objects moved at extremely high speed from west to east at about 5,000 ft. They lacked navigation or strobe lights and were visible for only 2–3 seconds. Witnesses included a private pilot and his wife, who reported the sighting to NUFORC.
Drone footage captured a fast-moving object that stopped suddenly over a mountain before shooting upward at incredible speed. Shared online by @Truthpolex, the footage drew numerous witness comments.
Report of unexplained animal injuries and a semi-invisible figure near Garzas Lake. Low-confidence monitor item pending primary evidence.
Subsea probe detected a pulse at 6 100 m causing an echo scatter pattern unlike geological events.
Security-camera report of a pixelated/translucent humanoid form; secondary-source intake requiring original media and witness verification.
NUFORC report of a rectangular, glowing craft with red/green/white lights ~6 stories up; faint buzzing; drifted east; one witness.

Logan Paul reports witnessing a bright, fast-moving luminous object crossing the sky over the marina area. The video shows a concentrated white light traveling horizontally at high speed with no visible navigation lights or audible sound, exiting the frame in under a second. Multiple voices react with confusion. No official explanation is given.
